Doshaguma's Might.description: Temporarily increases attack after a successful Power Clash or Offset attack
levels: Temporarily grants attack +10 after a successful Power Clash or Offset attack
Temporarily grants attack +25 after a successful Power Clash or Offset attack

Rathalos's Flare.description: Chance to deal additional fire damage after landing an attack.
levels: Chance to deal additional fire damage after landing an attack.
Increases additional fire damage after landing an attack.

Xu Wu's Vigor.description: Temporarily grants attack after eating meat items (lasts 2 minutes).
levels: Temporarily grants attack +15 after eating items such as well-done steak.
Temporarily grants attack +30 after eating items such as well-done steak.

Gravios's Protection.description: Reduces the damage you take when your health is full.
levels: Reduces the damage you take by 20% when your health is full.
Reduces the damage you take by 35% when your health is full.

Blangonga's Spirit.description: Using the To Victory! gesture increases attack temporarily to nearby allies. Also effects Palicoes and Support Hunters.  Lasts 3 minutes.
levels: Using the To Victory! gesture moderately  increases attack temporarily to nearby allies. Greatly effects Palicoes and Support Hunters.
Using the To Victory! gesture increases attack temporarily to nearby allies. Greatly effects Palicoes and Support Hunters.

Ebony Odogaron's Power.description: Extends the duration of the Burst skill and grants attack while Burst is active.
levels: Extends the duration of the Burst skill and grants attack +8 while Burst is active.
Further extends the duration of the Burst skill and grants attack +18 while Burst is active.
Grants an additional Stamina Gauge.
Grants an additional long Stamina Gauge.

Uth Duna's Cover.description: Increases defense temporarily when using a specialized tool.
levels: Increases defense temporarily when using a specialized tool.
Greatly increases defense and resistance temporarily when using a specialized tool.

Rey Dau's Voltage.description: Moderately extends the activation time of the Latent Power skill.
levels: Moderately extends the activation time of the Latent Power skill.
Extends the activation time of the Latent Power skill.

Nu Udra's Mutiny.description: Deals additional damage while the Resentment skill is active.
levels: Deals moderate additional damage while the Resentment skill is active.
Deals additional damage while the Resentment skill is active.

Jin Dahaad's Revolt.description: Increases attack for 60 seconds after recovering from webbed status, frostblight, being pinned, or a Power Clash.
levels: Increases attack after recovering from webbed status, frostblight, being pinned, or a Power Clash.
Greatly increases attack after recovering from webbed status, frostblight, being pinned, or a Power Clash.

Gore Magala's Tyranny.description: Infects you with Frenzy when against large monsters.
levels: Infects you with Frenzy when against large monsters.
Infects you with Frenzy and raises attack when against large monsters. Attack power increases upon recovery.

Arkveld's Hunger.description: Regenerates your health as you continually attack a monster. Recovery varies by weapon.
levels: Regenerates a small amount of your health as you continually attack a monster. Recovery varies by weapon.
Regenerates your health as you continually attack a monster. Recovery varies by weapon.

Guardian Arkveld's Vitality.description: Restores a moderate amount of health when destroying a wound on a large monster.
levels: Restores a moderate amount of health when destroying a wound on a large monster.
Restores health when destroying a wound on a large monster.

Mizutsune's Prowess.description: Prevents major bubbleblight and increases evasion while afflicted with minor bubbleblight.
levels: Prevents major bubbleblight and grants you minor bubbleblight after evading several times.
In addition to previous effects, also increases evasion while afflicted with bubbleblight.

Zoh Shia's Pulse.description: Allows the Health Gauge to continue to slowly recover up to the max value, even if there is no red portion.
levels: Allows the Health Gauge to continue to slowly recover up to the max value, even if there is no red portion.
Allows the Health Gauge to continue to recover up to the max value, even if there is no red portion.

Blossomdance Prayer.description: During Blossomdance, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
levels: During Blossomdance, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
During Blossomdance, adds special items to quest rewards, and greatly boosts attack and defense.

Leviathan's Fury.description: Temporarily increases affinity and can deal extra thunder damage upon buildup. (Excludes some attacks.)
levels: Temporarily increases affinity and can deal extra thunder damage upon buildup. (Excludes some attacks.)
Further increases additional thunder damage and moderately extends the duration affinity is increased.

Seregios's Tenacity.description: Extends the duration of Adrenaline Rush. If triggered again while the skill is active, extends the effect duration once.
levels: Extends the duration of Adrenaline Rush. If triggered again while the skill is active, extends the effect duration once.
Additionally, if triggered again while the skill is active, further increases attack.

Flamefete Prayer.description: During Flamefete, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
levels: During Flamefete, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
During Flamefete, adds special items to quest rewards, and greatly boosts attack and defense.

Dreamspell Prayer.description: During Dreamspell, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
levels: During Dreamspell, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
During Dreamspell, adds special items to quest rewards, and greatly boosts attack and defense.

Lumenhymn Prayer.description: During Lumenhymn, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
levels: During Lumenhymn, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
During Lumenhymn, adds special items to quest rewards, and greatly boosts attack and defense.

Soul of the Dark Knight.description: Having recoverable damage increases elemental attack, and some great sword Lvl 3 charged slashes are strengthened.
levels: Having recoverable damage increases elemental attack, and some great sword Lvl 3 charged slashes are strengthened.
Allows you to perform the special action: The Blackest Night.

Omega Resonance.description: (When quest starts) Local and Remote Resonance alternate, increasing attack or affinity when conditions are met.
levels: (When quest starts) Local and Remote Resonance alternate, increasing attack or affinity when conditions are met.
Increases the effect of Resonance I, and the effect of the weapon skill Synthetic Shield or the effect of Synergy.

Gogmapocalypse.description: Increases elemental attack when large monsters become enraged.
levels: Increases elemental attack when large monsters become enraged.
Level I effect is increased, and you gain a temporary damage barrier. (Barrier reactivates after cooldown.)
